reason: Recent experiments are over-concentrated in family 'take-profit'; try a different mechanism/family before more local tuning.

changes.reason: Call-wall acceptance has only one observed trade but it is exceptionally clean; relaxing net DEX from the current 1B to the grid's 750M expands the sample without removing the positive DEX concept.
Current 0.10 call-volume expansion may be too sparse for this profile; 0.05 is the mildest grid relaxation and should test whether cleaner call-wall entries are being missed.
Use the 30 second grid value to require slightly more stable strike acceptance while the flow threshold is relaxed, reducing the chance of noisy wall-chase entries.
Raise the profile's adaptive cap from 6 to 7 so newly admitted call-wall continuation trades are not prematurely capped when option target distance is wide.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long from a one-trade sample toward a measurable profile while preserving valid-0DTE option confirmation. Main tradeoff is possible added wall-chase exposure; reject if profile MAE rises above roughly -100 or total net profit falls below 98% of run_001.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as a controlled sample-builder. The latest run shows call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored but clean: 1 VALID_0DTE trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, -11.7 MAE. Prior saturated take-profit and 1DTE/fallback tightening hurt score, so the next non-repeated mechanism should expand a high-quality option-confirmed profile rather than tighten broad gates.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long has only 1 trade, but it produced $91 with -11.7 MAE and 455 PnL/exposure hour while broader 1DTE/fallback tightening reduced score and net profit.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Single-trade evidence can overfit; looser call-volume and DEX thresholds may admit noisy continuation entries or displace stronger pullback/squeeze fills.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE state with positive net DEX, positive forward DEX, accepted strike/wall context, and modest call-volume expansion.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: At least 5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE better than -60, worst MAE better than -100, total net profit at least 98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.
